goal: Validate whether the microstructure feature family (primarily cf_micro_imbalance_1h) provides a real overlay alpha on top of the immutable base via honest lockbox comparison.
global_constraints: Base active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify snapshot, thresholds, hours, days, execution, or feature set
Only microstructure_proxies family is active in v10; all other families are locked
Lockbox overlay comparison (base vs base+overlay on the same window) is the sole valid truth test
Overlay-first: prove veto-overlay before attempting early-cut or directional scout
Simpler before smarter: single-feature bucket/threshold rules before logistic before CatBoost
Short-first priority: short veto models before long veto models
Label quality over model sophistication — noisy labels kill any model

Forbidden: net_pnl>0 as sole veto label; re-opening closed directions (leadership, breadth, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, event-only overlays, trade-quality without new information layer, derivatives without real OI/liquidation/basis data)
Nothing is declared an improvement unless it passes matched OOS comparison against the base on the same lockbox window

slices.title: Optional route execution
slices.hypothesis: Провести только ту ветку (early-cut или directional scout), которая действительно заслужила открытие на gate.
slices.objective: Провести только ту ветку (early-cut или directional scout), которая действительно заслужила открытие на gate.
success_criteria: Открытая ветка (если есть) проведена до конца
evidence_requirements: Открытая ветка (если есть) проведена до конца

slices.title: Финальный вердикт по v10
slices.hypothesis: Получить честное решение по microstructure family: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST или REJECT.
slices.objective: Получить честное решение по microstructure family: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST или REJECT.
success_criteria: Final route classification определён (PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT)
evidence_requirements: Final route classification определён (PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT)
